Notice Of Motion Adnm Otion For Prove Up Hearing For An Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: S. Wong # 11288.

John J. Fallat Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) W
Plaintiff's Witness: ------------------ was placed under oath and direct examined.

Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was in file.

Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) ------------ for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $
Prejudgment Interest - $
Attorney's Fees - $ or (Reserved = Counsel shall submit a declaration re: calculation of attorney fees and a proposed judgment to the Court no later than ----------date--- )
Costs - $
Total judgment in the amount of $

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Counsel to prepare Judgment and submit to Dept. 514 for signature.
